name: Workout Tracker
description: A PWA for tracking weekly workouts across strength, cardio, mobility, and mindfulness. Multi-user, real-time sync via Firebase, with streak tracking and celebration animations.

name: Bread Planner
description: A baking scheduler for sourdough and naturally leavened breads. Enter your desired bake time and it works backwards through fermentation, shaping, and proofing to tell you exactly when to start.

name: FridgeCal
description: Photograph the family whiteboard and it parses the shorthand — OTF, CCT, Bay City basketball — and pushes the week's events straight to Google Calendar. Built for the fridge calendar, which actually runs the household.

name: Campsite Dashboard
description: A planning dashboard for backcountry camping trips — tracking permits, gear checklists, and route data.
